query: lens flare halation light leak film photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — halation, light leaks, lo-fi optical color streaks

response.objective_caption: A person with brown hair wearing a red garment and a light-colored scarf or collar stands at the right edge of the frame. Behind them, horizontal bands of multicolored light in red, orange, yellow, green, and blue stretch across a dark nighttime background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An intentionally blurred nighttime photograph shows a person with brown hair in a red garment and a light-colored scarf at the right edge, their features softened and smeared by motion. Behind them, vibrant artificial light sources stretch into sweeping horizontal streaks of red, orange, green, and blue against the darkness, creating a dynamic, dreamlike atmosphere through deliberate motion blur.
